creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lippe
Date: Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013
New Revision: 322261
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322261

Log:
  YAP is a high-performance Prolog compiler developed at
  LIACC/Universidade do Porto and at COPPE Sistemas/UFRJ. Its Prolog
  engine is based in the WAM (Warren Abstract Machine), with several
  optimizations for better performance. YAP follows the Edinburgh
  tradition, and is largely compatible with the ISO-Prolog standard and
  with Quintus and SICStus Prolog.
  
  WWW: http://www.dcc.fc.up.pt/~vsc/Yap/
  
  PR:		ports/180068
  Submitted by:	Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/lang/yap/
  head/lang/yap/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/lang/yap/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/lang/yap/files/
  head/lang/yap/files/patch-library__dialect__swi__fli__blobs.c   (contents, props changed)
  head/lang/yap/files/patch-packages__swi-minisat2__C__SolverTypes.h   (contents, props changed)
  head/lang/yap/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/lang/yap/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/lang/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 21:28:41 2013	(r322260)
+++ head/lang/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013	(r322261)
@@ -375,6 +375,7 @@
     SUBDIR += xds-c
     SUBDIR += xotcl
     SUBDIR += yabasic
+    SUBDIR += yap
     SUBDIR += yorick
     SUBDIR += ypsilon
 

Added: head/lang/yap/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/lang/yap/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013	(r322261)
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+# Created by: Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	yap
+PORTVERSION=	6.2.2
+CATEGORIES=	lang
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dcc.fc.up.pt/~vsc/Yap/
+
+MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	High-performance Prolog compiler
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS=""
+USE_TEX=	base texmf latex
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/texi2html:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/texi2html
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/texi2pdf:${PORTSDIR}/print/texinfo
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS="@comment "
+.endif
+
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-max-performance
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+
+DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/Yap
+DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/Yap
+
+post-build:
+.if empty(PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS)
+	# prevent the instalation of three docs files
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '559,562d' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+.endif
+
+post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} ; ${MAKE} install_docs)
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================

+++ head/lang/yap/files/patch-library__dialect__swi__fli__blobs.c	Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013	(r322261)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- ./library/dialect/swi/fli/blobs.c.orig	2013-06-28 00:56:12.000000000 -0300
++++ ./library/dialect/swi/fli/blobs.c	2013-06-28 00:56:27.000000000 -0300
+@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
+ #include	<Yap.h>
+ #include	<Yatom.h>
+ 
++#include <stdio.h>
+ #include <string.h>
+

Added: head/lang/yap/files/patch-packages__swi-minisat2__C__SolverTypes.h
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/lang/yap/files/patch-packages__swi-minisat2__C__SolverTypes.h	Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013	(r322261)
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+--- ./packages/swi-minisat2/C/SolverTypes.h.orig	2013-06-28 00:56:48.000000000 -0300
++++ ./packages/swi-minisat2/C/SolverTypes.h	2013-06-28 00:57:51.000000000 -0300
+@@ -119,11 +119,7 @@
+ 
+     // -- use this function instead:
+     template<class V>
+-    friend Clause* Clause_new(const V& ps, bool learnt = false) {
+-        assert(sizeof(Lit)      == sizeof(uint32_t));
+-        assert(sizeof(float)    == sizeof(uint32_t));
+-        void* mem = malloc(sizeof(Clause) + sizeof(uint32_t)*(ps.size()));
+-        return new (mem) Clause(ps, learnt); }
++    friend Clause* Clause_new(const V& ps, bool learnt = false);
+ 
+     int          size        ()      const   { return size_etc >> 3; }
+     void         shrink      (int i)         { assert(i <= size()); size_etc = (((size_etc >> 3) - i) << 3) | (size_etc & 7); }
+@@ -146,6 +142,14 @@
+     void         strengthen  (Lit p);
+ };
+ 
++template<class V>
++Clause* Clause_new(const V& ps, bool learnt) {
++    assert(sizeof(Lit)      == sizeof(uint32_t));
++    assert(sizeof(float)    == sizeof(uint32_t));
++    void* mem = malloc(sizeof(Clause) + sizeof(uint32_t)*(ps.size()));
++    return new (mem) Clause(ps, learnt);
++}
++
+ 
+ /*_________________________________________________________________________________________________
+ |

Added: head/lang/yap/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/lang/yap/pkg-descr	Wed Jul  3 23:16:34 2013	(r322261)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+YAP is a high-performance Prolog compiler developed at
+LIACC/Universidade do Porto and at COPPE Sistemas/UFRJ. Its Prolog
+engine is based in the WAM (Warren Abstract Machine), with several
+optimizations for better performance. YAP follows the Edinburgh
+tradition, and is largely compatible with the ISO-Prolog standard and
+with Quintus and SICStus Prolog.
+
+WWW: http://www.dcc.fc.up.pt/~vsc/Yap/
